raw_json: {"signals":[{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"event","confidence":0.95,"matched_text":"In the lead-up to the Brexit vote in 2016, the value of the British pound (GBP) decreased significantly against other major currencies, such as the US dollar (USD) and the Euro (EUR), due to uncertainty about the outcome of the vote and the potential economic consequences of a \"Leave\" vote.","distilled_fact":"In the lead-up to the Brexit vote in 2016, the value of the British pound (GBP) decreased significantly against the US dollar (USD) and the Euro (EUR) due to uncertainty about the outcome of the vote and the potential economic consequences of a \"Leave\" vote."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"event","confidence":0.93,"matched_text":"After the vote, the value of the GBP continued to decrease, reaching a 31-year low against the USD in October 2016.","distilled_fact":"After the Brexit vote in 2016, the value of the British pound (GBP) continued to decrease and reached a 31-year low against the US dollar (USD) in October 2016."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"fact","confidence":0.88,"matched_text":"there is no direct evidence to suggest that Brexit was the sole cause of the changes in currency exchange rates.","distilled_fact":"There is no direct evidence that Brexit was the sole cause of the changes in currency exchange rates."},{"signal_kind":"potential_claim","object_kind":"process","confidence":0.79,"matched_text":"the exchange rate has fluctuated and can vary depending on many factors like the economic performance of the country, the interest rate, the inflation rate, and the political situation.","distilled_fact":"Since 2016, the exchange rate has fluctuated and can vary depending on the economic performance of the country, the interest rate, the inflation rate, and the political situation."}]}
